text.message: Never seen a more obvious first settle in my life
oh wow, left room for blue, how nice :)
Now somebody gonna go 8/10 and make me sad
It’s ok OJ I forgive you
i might have to take it...
i was hoping to settle the 8 wheat
i'm not sure if it's better to take it or go big prod
It’s all good I don’t blame you
I knew that road up was risky but 10 times out of 10 worth the risk
I’m not a spiteful player OJ we can still be friends
but the road looks like a mess cutting through red.
think reds gonna cook after wood port ngl
wanted to give blue a nb
I typo that was same sentence
I’d hate for either of us to waste a road trip
but you have same number of cards as blue, so fair?
i let the bot pick, didn't even see who i stole from first time
it's tricky, i kind of want black saving knights for the 8 ore
guess i blocked all the brick
Lowkey saved the game tho red would be absolutely cooking rn
guess black doesn't want me saving knights for the 8.  hmm
There’s no way u didn’t have wood
That’s a bit crazy red to say ur gonna block me all game when
how in the world do you hae 3 devs. blue.
I ported for that same ore
I’m selling the game if u plow me anywhere
red, are you going for the 10 wheat 3-1?
If u give me a trade
you rob me every time so i don't want you getting more knights
will show you once you block me again
i invited you to conserve knights to protect 8 - you declined
i mean, kinda kills my game, but don't think i'm building to 10 here.
and black went to war with me, so don't really want to help him
otherwise  red goes to 7 with 3 down devs
anyone need ore?  can't even use it
dude, you rob me all game.  lol
you started robbing me when i was on 2 pts
nope.  it was red at the beginning.
blocked the 6 brick for a while, remember?
when blue was on 3pts  with 2 down devs you hit me on 2ptss
